examples: He got undressed in a small cubicle next to the pool.
I'm not the kind of person to sit in a cubicle behind a desk.
It's common to have a "cubicle mate" or special confidant in a work setting.
Business-class fliers have their own mini-cubicle with a seat that adjusts to lie fully flat.
Stop trying to fit the starry shape of your brilliance into a man-made commercial cubicle.
